top_signals.title: Elon Musk Shows More Detailed Design of AI Data Center Satellite
top_signals.summary: SpaceX Chief Executive Officer Elon Musk unveiled a more detailed look at an initial version of an AI data center satellite that the company plans to build, providing more insight into the ambitious project that is driving SpaceX’s highly anticipated IPO set to take place later this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Iranian Crude Offered to China at Discount as Demand Softens - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Iranian Crude Offered to China at Discount as Demand Softens  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Armenia’s pro-Europe party wins election despite Russia-linked disinformation
top_signals.summary: Pashinyan's Civil Contract party won nearly 50% of Sunday's vote, defeating the pro-Russian Strong Armenia party led by Russian-Armenian billionaire Samvel Karapetyan, which received around 23% of the vote.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: USDA Secretary Rollins calls Texas ag chief 'unserious' amid screwworm threat
top_signals.summary: Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller lost his bid for a fourth term in a March Republican primary, despite Trump's endorsement.
